anxiety-1.title: Feeling Lost in a Panic?
anxiety-1.description: When anxiety hits, it's hard to find calm. A simple message can be a lifeline - let's be that for someone today #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-2.title: What to Text When Someone's Having a Panic
anxiety-2.description: When a friend is spiraling, a simple text can bring them back to earth. Try sending a gentle reminder that they're safe and their body is just trying to protect them. #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-3.title: How to Support a Friend in Panic
anxiety-3.description: When your friend is spiraling, a simple reminder can help them feel grounded. Let them know they aren't alone and this too shall pass #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-4.title: Feeling Safe Again in a Moment of Anxiety
anxiety-4.description: When someone's spiraling, these 5 simple words can be a lifeline. Remind a friend they're loved, safe, and not alone #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-5.title: Send to someone having a panic attack
anxiety-5.description: Help a friend feel safe and grounded with a simple message. It's a small act of kindness that can make a big difference #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-6.title: Breathe Through Anxiety with a Friend's Help
anxiety-6.description: When a friend is struggling, sometimes all they need is a gentle reminder to slow down and breathe. A simple ask can help them feel grounded and safe. #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-7.title: Helping Friends in Anxiety: Imperfect Words Matter
anxiety-7.description: You don't have to be a pro to help someone feel safe during a panic attack. Simple questions can be a lifeline. #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-8.title: Staying on the Line During a Panic Attack
anxiety-8.description: When someone's freaking out, just being present can help them feel grounded. A simple promise to stay on the line can make all the difference #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-9.title: When Words Fail: Soothing Anxiety's Dark Moments
anxiety-9.description: Sometimes, all we need is a gentle reminder to ride out the storm. This simple phrase helps you feel safe and grounded when anxiety takes over. #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

anxiety-10.title: One Simple Text to Ease Anxiety Attacks
anxiety-10.description: When a friend's world is spinning, a few words can bring them back to earth. You've been there too, and your voice matters #anxiety #mentalhealth #panicattack #grounding #selfcare

just-because-1.title: Need a Random Boost of Encouragement?
just-because-1.description: Sometimes all we need is a little reminder that we're on someone's mind. Send this to a friend who could use a pick-me-up! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-2.title: What to Text When You're Missing Someone
just-because-2.description: A simple message can brighten someone's day! Let them know they're on your mind and in your heart #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-3.title: How to Support a Friend Feeling Appreciated
just-because-3.description: A simple message can go a long way! Let a friend know you're glad they're in your life #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-4.title: When You Feel Like You're Making a Difference
just-because-4.description: A simple reminder to let a friend know they're on your mind and in your heart. Sending love and positivity your way! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-5.title: Send to someone who needs a pick-me-up
just-because-5.description: Remind a friend they're on your mind and in your heart. A simple message can brighten their day! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-6.title: Boost a Friend's Day with a Thoughtful Check-In
just-because-6.description: Remind a loved one they're on your mind with a simple, heartfelt message. It's a small gesture that can make a big impact! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-7.title: Imperfect Words Can Be Perfectly Enough
just-because-7.description: Sometimes all someone needs is a little reminder they're seen and loved. A simple check-in can brighten their day and yours! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-8.title: A Simple Text to Show You Care
just-because-8.description: Sometimes all someone needs is a reminder they're seen and loved. Send a heartfelt text to a friend and brighten their day! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-9.title: When Words Fail, Send a Virtual Hug
just-because-9.description: Sometimes a simple gesture can speak volumes. A quick digital squeeze can remind a friend they're not alone #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

just-because-10.title: Simple Texts That Changed Everything
just-because-10.description: Sometimes it's the simplest messages that remind us we're seen & loved. Wishing you peaceful vibes! #thinkingofyou #friendshipgoals #positivity #spreadlove #goodvibes

breakup-1.title: When Anger Takes Over After a Breakup
breakup-1.description: You're fuming on their behalf - now what? Validating their pain (and yours) can be a great start #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-2.title: What to Text When a Friend Gets Dumped
breakup-2.description: Your friend's world is crashing down - let them know you're there to catch them. A simple text can be the comfort they need to start healing. #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-3.title: How to support a friend who's grieving love
breakup-3.description: When a friend's world is crumbling, show up with practical love - like pizza! It's a small act that says "I've got you". #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-4.title: Feeling Furious and Heartbroken at Once
breakup-4.description: Breakups are messy and emotions are complex. You're not crazy for feeling both anger and sadness - it's a normal part of healing. #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-5.title: Send this to someone who needs comfort
breakup-5.description: When a friend's heart is shattered, show up and be present. Sometimes, silence speaks louder than words. #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-6.title: Remind Them Pain Won't Last Forever Advice
breakup-6.description: When a friend's heart is broken, a gentle reminder can mean the world. You're here for them and so much love is ahead! #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-7.title: You're Not Alone in This Heartache Moment
breakup-7.description: When a friend's world is crashing down, sometimes all they need is someone to take the wheel. You don't have to have the perfect words, just a willing ear and a helping hand. #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-8.title: Remind Them of Their Worth After Breakup
breakup-8.description: When a friend's heart is shattered, a little reminder can go a long way. You got this, friend! #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-9.title: When Words Fail After a Breakup
breakup-9.description: Sometimes you just need to remind your friend they're loved. A simple truth to hold onto when heartache feels overwhelming. #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice

breakup-10.title: Breakup Pain: 1 Simple Text to Send
breakup-10.description: When a friend's world is shattered, a small gesture can help. A heartfelt text can be their lifeline #breakupsupport #selflove #heartbreak #healing #relationshipadvice
